form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. Resuming 3rd of 10 at Cavaillon on March 1 over 1600m, on a slow track; 2.5 len behind Sigrune with 52.5kg. form.formComment: Last start raced on the pace before fading ran last of 12 at Deauville All Weather on April 8 over 1400m, 12 len behind Autumn Twilight with 54.5kg at $12.
